Video.summary: Ted and Dusty infiltrate a band of outlaws to get close to Mr. Gentry, the man who murdered Ted's father.
Video.title: West of the Divide

Video.summary: Townsfolk turn against their sheriff (Harry Carey) because of his outlaw son (Edward Norris).
Video.title: Wagon Trail

Video.summary: The Three Mesquiteers (Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune) discover a painted horse and a fandango dancer.
Video.title: Hit the Saddle

Video.summary: Three men (Richard Dix, Leo Carrillo, Preston Foster) start a big cattle ranch in post-Civil War Texas, but greed destroys it.
Video.title: American Empire

Video.summary: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).
Video.title: Sitting Bull

Video.summary: Marshal John Travers investigates the murder of a town's sheriff, makes it his mission to restore order to the town and bring down a bandit called the Shadow.
Video.title: The Star Packer

Video.summary: An Easterner (George O'Brien) finds rustlers and a sweetheart (Irene Hervey) on the ranch he inherited out West.
Video.title: The Dude Ranger

Video.summary: A singing-cowboy congressman (Roy Rogers) goes to Washington to save ranchers from a power dam.
Video.title: Under Western Stars

Video.summary: A federal investigator (Tim McCoy) poses as an outlaw to catch a gang of counterfeiters which has kidnapped a government engraver.
Video.title: Phantom Ranger

Video.summary: Agent Saunders (John Wayne) becomes partners with Fay (Cecelia Parker) to help her fight off a gang run by a local land grabber.
Video.title: Riders of Destiny

Video.summary: Red Ryder (Jim Bannon) KOs a fight racket with sidekick Little Beaver (Little Brown Jug) and a new friend.
Video.title: The Cowboy and the Prizefighter

Video.summary: An Oregon Trail scout (Randolph Scott) woos a member (Gail Patrick) of his wagon train in Indian country.
Video.title: Wagon Wheels

Video.summary: Texas brothers (Robert Preston, Robert Sterling) feud over land and cattle, with a younger brother between them.
Video.title: The Sundowners

Video.summary: Cisco is challenged by a man who seeks revenge after being jailed.
Video.title: Chain Lightning

Video.summary: Tiburcio Vasquez vows vengeance against Anglos after his sister Dolores is killed; Matt and Frankie try to stop his years of terror in Southern California after a railroad agent is killed with the help of local priest.
Video.title: Tiburcio Vasquez

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho hope to imprison the leader of a rustling ring.
Video.title: Medicine Flats

Video.summary: The man behind a string of stagecoach robberies has remained out of reach of company detectives Matt and Frankie, but reinforcements from the city help to crack the case.
Video.title: Black Bart

Video.summary: After being wrongfully jailed on a murder charge, Cisco and Pancho escape to capture the real murderer.
Video.title: Oil Land

Video.summary: A con man resorts to murder in a phony land promotion scheme.
Video.title: Railroad Land Rush

Video.summary: The 1850s California gold fields is home to notorious bandit Joaquin Murietta; Matt and Frankie arrive to track him down but he kidnaps Frankie; Matt and Captain Love trail Murietta to the bitter end.
Video.title: Joaquin Murietta

Video.summary: Matt enlists the aid of Dakota chiefs to bring in Crazy Horse.
Video.title: Chief Crazy Horse

Video.summary: A series of thefts are falsely attributed to the innocent Mingo False Faces.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: False Faces

Video.summary: Lt. Briggs breaks the treaty by chasing an Indian beyond the recognized border; Led into an ambush he escapes but his militiamen are captured; Hawkeye and Chingachgook are assigned to escort him to his court-martial and probable hanging.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Prisoner

Video.summary: Surveyor George Washington aids a young woman whose land grant is threatened by a wicked innkeeper.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: Washington Story

Video.summary: More unrest between the white men and the Ottawas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Reckoning

Video.summary: Fortune hunters seek a treasure rumored to have belonged to the French explorer La Salle; they ask Hawkeye to lead them but when he discovers that it is in a sacred Dakota burial ground he tries to dissuade them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: La Salle's Treasure

Video.summary: Frontier wives hope to join their husbands in time for Christmas.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: Winter Passage

Video.summary: Hawkeye has tracked outlaw Simon Girty to Morristown but he and Chingachgook are turned away and told that the town is closed due to an outbreak of the black plague; Hawkeye decides to sneak in and see for himself.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: Morristown Story

Video.summary: Chief Black Wolf and his tribe are accused of breaking the treaty; it is up to Hawkeye and Chingachgook to clear them.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hawkeye and the Last of the Mohicans
Video.title: The Colonel and His Lady
